payload.description: MTA Bridges and Tunnels Committee responsible for oversight of B&T operations, finances, safety, and procurements

evidence_refs.source_quote: BRIDGES AND TUNNELS COMMITTEE WORK PLAN

payload.description: MTA Procurement department responsible for procurement action items requiring Board approval
MTA Board that receives recommendations and actions from the Bridges and Tunnels Committee

evidence_refs.source_quote: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval
The Committee will recommend action to the Board.

payload.description: MTA Finance department responsible for financial reports, budgets, and financial plans presented to the Bridges and Tunnels Committee
Facility Management responsible for operating performance reporting to the Bridges and Tunnels Committee

evidence_refs.source_quote: Report on Operations Facility Mgt & Tolling Mgt

payload.description: Tolling Management responsible for revenue collection and tolling operations reporting

evidence_refs.source_quote: Report on Operations Facility Mgt & Tolling Mgt

payload.description: Environment, Health & Safety responsible for safety report and security operations reporting

payload.claim_text: The Approval of Minutes is the approval of the official proceedings of the Committee Meeting. Responsibility: Committee Chair & Members.
payload.subject: Bridges and Tunnels Committee

payload.claim_text: Committee Work Plan is a recurring agenda item. Responsibility: Committee Chair & Members.
payload.subject: Bridges and Tunnels Committee

payload.claim_text: Summary of major B&T service indicators, including graphs and tables depicting total traffic for all facilities, average daily traffic by method of payment and vehicle type, traffic by facility, and data on factors that can impact B&T traffic such as weather and gasoline prices. The Report on Operations is provided on a two-month lag, except in September when it includes reports with June and July data. Responsibility: Facility Mgt & Tolling Mgt.
payload.subject: Bridges and Tunnels Committee

payload.claim_text: A compilation of key leading and lagging customer and employee safety indicators, including collision rates, employee lost time injury rates, and leading indicators for roadway and fire safety. The Safety Report is provided on a two-month lag, except in September when it includes reports with June and July data. Responsibility: Env, Health & Safety.
payload.subject: Bridges and Tunnels Committee

payload.claim_text: Summary presentation of the financial indicators for the month, which includes the Balance Sheet for the reported month, Accrual Statement of Operations for the month and year-to-date, variance analysis, traffic volume and ridership information, toll collection rates, and headcount charts. The Financial Report is provided on a one-month lag, except in the month of September, at which time it includes the July and August reports. Responsibility: MTA Finance.
payload.subject: Bridges and Tunnels Committee

payload.claim_text: Summary of B&T workforce numbers, new hires, separations, Employee Resource Group (ERG) events and accomplishments, and complaints. The Diversity and Equal Opportunity Report provides information quarterly and included in the Committee Book.
payload.subject: Bridges and Tunnels Committee

payload.claim_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval. The non-competitive items are listed first, followed by competitive items, and then ratifications. The list will indicate items that require a 2/3 vote and a majority vote of the Board for approval. Procurements are for the current month; in the month of September, the August and September procurements are included. Staff summary documents presented to the Board for approval for items affecting business standards and practices. Responsibility: MTA Procurement.
payload.subject: Bridges and Tunnels Committee

payload.subject: Bridges and Tunnels Committee
payload.description: January 2025 specific agenda item: B&T 2024 accomplishments summary

payload.claim_text: The Committee received a draft work plan for 2025 at the December 2024 meeting. The Committee will be requested to approve the amended work plan for the year.
payload.subject: Bridges and Tunnels Committee

payload.claim_text: Present revised 2025 Adopted Budget and Financial Plan which incorporates any changes made by the Board at the December 2024 meeting and any agency technical adjustments is included for information. Responsibility: MTA Finance.
payload.subject: Bridges and Tunnels Committee

payload.claim_text: The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the 2024 B&T Operating Surplus.
payload.subject: Bridges and Tunnels Committee

payload.claim_text: Present update on operations, maintenance, and construction. Appears on the agenda for February, June, September, and November 2025.
payload.subject: Bridges and Tunnels Committee

tool_args.label: Final Review of 2024 Year-End Operating Budget Results

payload.claim_text: The customary review of prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance will be presented to the Committee. Each Agency will present for inclusion in the agenda materials, and be prepared to answer questions on, a review of its financial performance. The MTA Finance will prepare an overall review also for inclusion in the materials that draws MTA-wide conclusions.
payload.subject: Bridges and Tunnels Committee

payload.claim_text: Present highlights of the Preliminary Budget to the Committee. Public comment will be accepted on the 2026 Preliminary Budget. Presented in both September and October 2025.
payload.subject: Bridges and Tunnels Committee

payload.claim_text: Provide update on collection of revenue, including tolls and fees. Appears in June, October 2025. Responsibility: Tolling Mgt.
payload.subject: Bridges and Tunnels Committee

payload.claim_text: Present an update on enforcement. Responsibility: President. Scheduled for March 2025.
payload.subject: Bridges and Tunnels Committee

payload.claim_text: Present an update on security and enforcement. Responsibility: Security & Operations.
payload.subject: Bridges and Tunnels Committee

payload.claim_text: Present update on safety including customer and employee safety.
payload.subject: Bridges and Tunnels Committee
